review_notes: The functions generally map well to the NIST SI-2(5) control focusing on automatic updates and flaw remediation. The naming conventions mostly follow the prescribed pattern, but a minor change was made for consistency. The functions are technically accurate and relevant to Kubernetes security practices.
naming_improvements: Use 'update' instead of 'upgrade' for consistency with common terminology in Kubernetes.
title: Flaw Remediation - Flaw remediation | automatic software and firmware updates install [ assignment
step1_reasoning: The control SI-2(5) focuses on automatic software and firmware updates, which can be mapped to ensuring that Kubernetes nodes and clusters are configured for automatic updates. Additionally, ensuring images are always pulled with the latest updates and scanned for vulnerabilities aligns with the intent of flaw remediation.
